reviews.name: 김나무
reviews.content:
🧡개사원 솔직리뷰🧡

안녕하세요! 소문난 눈꼽부자 나무가 [젤리곰 라운드 페이스콤] 먼저 써봤습니다!
저는 어렸을 때부터 털이 눈을 찔러서 매일 대왕 눈꼽을 달고 살았어요. 흔하게 볼 수 있는 눈꼽빗 대부분 끝이 뾰족해서 저도 누나도 항상 불안했는데요ㅠㅠ
이 눈꼽빗은 끝이 둥근 빗살이 라운드 형태로 있어서 눈에 딱 잘 맞고요! 게다가 손잡이까지 있어 짧은 눈꼽빗보다 훨씬 더 안정적으로 편안하게 사용할 수 있어요! 특히 저는 누나와 자주 출근하는데, 크기가 작아서 누나가 가방 앞주머니에 쏙 넣고 다니기 좋다고 하네요?
세상에 없던 눈꼽빗이라더니...! 편한 건 기본이고 가격도 착해서 주변에 선물하기도 좋아요!
이 빗 안 써본 사람, 강아지 없게 해주세요🙏
reviews.content_en:
🧡Dog Employee Honest Review🧡

Hello! Namu, the famous tear stain enthusiast, tried the [JELLY BEAR Round Face Comb] first!
I've had hair poking my eyes since I was little, so I've always had major tear stains. Most common tear stain combs have pointy ends, so both my sister and I were always nervous about using them ㅠㅠ
But this tear stain comb has rounded comb teeth in a round shape that fits perfectly around the eyes! Plus, it has a handle, so it's much more stable and comfortable to use compared to short tear stain combs! Especially since my sister and I often commute together, the small size is perfect—my sister said she can just pop it into the front pocket of her bag?
They say this is a tear stain comb the world has never seen before...! It's comfortable to use, and the price is fair, so it's great for giving as gifts too!
Anyone who hasn't tried this comb, please never be without a dog 🙏

reviews.name: 코****
reviews.content:
🧡개사원 솔직리뷰🧡

보송보송 털숑 코코는 페이스콤을 입가 털 정리에도 잘 쓰고 있어요! 쉽고 빠른 눈곱제거는 물론 밥이나 물 먹고 축축하고 더러워진 입가 가볍게 닦아준 후 이 젤리곰 페이스콤으로 슥슥 빗어주면 귀여움이 되살아나요...🤩 기존에 쓰는 그 미니 콤같은 일자빗은 쥐는게 좀 어색하고 불편하고, 끝이 뾰족해서 내적 긴장감이 대박이었는데... 이건 핸들형이라 그런지 빗질 잘 못하는 저도 아주 편하게 사용합니다! 가격도 너무 착해서 집, 사무실, 이동가방, 산책가방 하나씩 넣어놔도 딱 좋겠어용🤧
reviews.content_en:
🧡Dog Employee Honest Review🧡

Coco, with her fluffy and soft fur, uses the face comb great for grooming around her mouth too! It easily and quickly removes tear stains, and after gently wiping away the damp and dirty fur around her mouth from eating or drinking water, brushing it with this JELLY BEAR face comb brings back her cuteness...🤩 The old straight mini combs I used were awkward and uncomfortable to hold, and the pointy ends gave me so much internal anxiety... but because this one has a handle, even I, who's not great at combing, can use it very easily! The price is so reasonable that I'm thinking of keeping one each at home, the office, in my travel bag, and my walking bag 🤧

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
원래도 바잇미 페이스콤을 정말 잘 쓰고 있었는데 체험단 선정 되어 새로나온 라운드 페이스콤을 사용해 봤습니다
다른 작은 눈꼽빗에 비해서 손잡이 형식이라 사용하기 편하고 
끝부분이 라운드형으로 안전하게 느껴지더라구요!! 
눈꼽도 당연히 잘 나오고 빗도 촘촘 짱짱 해서 내돈내산으로 몇개 더 구매하려 합니다👍👍
reviews.content_en:
I was already using the BITE ME face comb really well, and I got selected as a tester to try the newly released round face comb.
Compared to other small tear stain combs, the handle design makes it so much easier to use,
and the rounded end feels really safe!! 
The tear stains come out easily of course, and the comb teeth are dense and sturdy, so I'm planning to buy a few more with my own money 👍👍

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
눈곱 떼는거부터 얼굴 빗질 너무 싫어하는 아이예요
시중에서 흔히 보이는 눈곱빗은 손에 들기만해도 도망가는데 이건 첨 보는거라 그런지 도망도 안가고 눈곱 떼는데도 얌전히 있네요😳
더 사용해봐야겠지만 디자인도 귀엽고 그립감도 좋고 만족스럽네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
My dog really hates getting tear stains removed and having her face combed
With the common tear stain combs you usually see, she runs away just by seeing them in my hand, but since this is something new, she doesn't run away and stays still when I remove her tear stains 😳
I'll need to use it more, but I'm satisfied with the cute design and comfortable grip ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 연****
reviews.content:
일자 눈곱빗 사용하다가 신상이 나왔다길래 사용해봤어요!!
이건 라운드 형태로 되어있어서 눈찔림 없이 안전하게 사용하기도 좋고, 손잡이라 길어서 그립감도 있으니 제 손도 편하고 댕댕이도 편하고ㅋㅋㅋ라운드로 되어있는게 신의 한수였어요.
촘촘하니 눈곱도 더 잘 떼어짐!!
그냥 사용하기보다 눈물 세정제로 불린 다음에 사용하니까 확실히 눈곱 정리가 더 잘 돼서 같이 사용하는거 추천드려요!!
reviews.content_en:
I was using a straight tear stain comb, and when I heard a new product came out, I tried it!!
Because this one has a round shape, it's safe to use without any risk of poking the eyes, and the handle makes it longer so it has a good grip—my hand feels comfortable and my pup feels comfortable too ㅋㅋㅋ Making it round was a stroke of genius.
The dense teeth make it even better at removing tear stains!!
I recommend using it with tear stain cleaner by first soaking the area, then using this comb—it definitely cleans the tear stains better that way!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
매일 약먹어서 입주변이 자주 지저분해지는 우리집 멈멍이는 페이스콤 매일쓰기때문에 이번에 바꿔봤는데 전에 쓰던거보다 손잡이가 있어서 훨씬 편하네요 잘빗겨집니다! 근데 진짜 손잡이 그립감 진짜로 좋음 진짜진짜임
그리고 눈이 잘 안보여서 손잡이가 없는 형태는 사람손이 눈앞에서 왔다갔다 하니까 질색팔색을 했는데 얘는 손잡이가 있어서 눈앞에 손이 안보이니까 무서워하지 않아요!
reviews.content_en:
My furry friend takes medicine every day so the area around his mouth gets dirty often, and since we use the face comb daily, I switched to this one this time, and it's so much more convenient with the handle compared to the one I used before. It combs really well! And the grip on that handle is seriously so good, I'm not even exaggerating.
Also, because my pup's eyes aren't great, the handles-less version would make him nervous seeing a human hand moving in front of his eyes, but this one has a handle so he can't see my hand in front of his eyes anymore, so he's not scared!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
🧸💭 모든 곰도리들이 질투할 만한 ❤︎ 
젤리곰 라운드 페이스콤 ! !! 
기존에 쓰던 게 있기는 하지만 여행용이라던지 갈 때 챙겨가려고 🤍단골고객전용🤍 뜨자마자 겟 했습니다 .. 🤧❤︎
손잡이 있는 건 처음 써보는데 생각보다 너무너무 편하고 귀여워요 깨알 곰도리 표정까지 ㅋㅋ ദ്ദി ˉ͈̀꒳ˉ͈́ )✧ 
매일매일 눈꼽 떼는 저희 쿠키한테는 필수템 !!
reviews.content_en:
🧸💭 Something all the bear lovers would be jealous of ❤︎
JELLY BEAR Round Face Comb! !!
I do have one I've been using, but I got this one as soon as it dropped 🤍VIP Customer Exclusive🤍 just in case I need to bring it for travels and such.. 🤧❤︎
It's my first time using one with a handle, and it's so much more convenient and cute than I thought! Even the little bear expression details are adorable ㅋㅋ ദ്ദി ˉ͈̀꒳ˉ͈́ )✧
For my Cookie who gets tear stains removed every single day, this is a must-have item!!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
처음구매했는데!
멈머들 눈꼽빗 진짜최고입니당
둥글해서 눈 찌를일도 없고 최고에요 ㅎㅎ
3개구매하길 잘한거같아요!
reviews.content_en:
First time buying it!
The mom's tear stain comb is seriously the best
It's round so there's no risk of poking the eyes and it's perfect ㅎㅎ
I'm glad I bought 3 of them!

reviews.name: 시****
reviews.content:
손잡이가 있어서 편하고 무엇보다 너무 귀여운 디쟈인..🫶🏻 
라운드 형태로 찔림없이 쉽고 안전하게 사용 가능! 
이제 눈꼽빗은 바잇미로 정착합니댜✨ 

🧸같이 쓰면 더 좋아요🧸
✔️바잇미 소프트 아이클리너
✔️바잇미 소프트코튼 화장솜
reviews.content_en:
The handle makes it convenient, and most importantly, the design is so adorable..🫶🏻
With the round shape, you can use it easily and safely without any poking!
I'm now settling on BITE ME for tear stain combs ✨

🧸Use it together for even better results🧸
✔️BITE ME Soft Eye Cleaner
✔️BITE ME Soft Cotton Pads

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
뭐야뭐야 바잇미 일내셨넹!!ㅎㅎ
빗 너무 기여운데 편하고 빗살 촘촘한데 일정한 간격! 
빗대도 길어서 잡고 빗기기 너무 편해요 ㅠㅠ 
모 브랜드에서 샀다가 실패한 경험있는데,, 
바잇미 페이스콤은 3개 구매했는데 3개다 완벽그잡채^^~
reviews.content_en:
Wow, BITE ME really did it!!ㅎㅎ
The comb is so cute and convenient, and the comb teeth are dense with consistent spacing!
The comb handle is long too so it's so easy to hold and comb ㅠㅠ
I had a bad experience buying from another brand,,
but I bought 3 BITE ME face combs and all 3 are absolutely perfect ^^~

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 일자빗보다 더 눈꼽정리하는데 좋아요 거부감도 적네요 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: It works better than a straight comb for cleaning eye boogers, and my dog doesn't resist it as much. I'm satisfied!

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content: 다이소에 파는 콤빗을 사용했는데 확실 손잡이가 있으니 훨씬 편하고 일자보다 라운드가 더 안전하고 덜 자극적인거 같네요!! 색도 예쁘고 곰돌이 모양도 귀엽고 눈곱이나 얼굴 털 제거가 잘 됩니다! 털이 뻑뻑하게 빗기는게 아니라 부드럽게 빗어져서 손잡이가 신의한수..💛
reviews.content_en: I used to use a comb from Daiso, but having a handle is definitely so much more convenient! The rounded shape is safer and less irritating than a straight one!! The color is pretty and the bear shape is adorable, and it removes eye boogers and face hair really well! Instead of combing harshly, it combs smoothly - the handle is a game changer..💛

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
기존에는 일자 콤브로 빗질할 때 눈 찌를까봐 
조마조마했는데 바잇미 젤리곰 콤브는 라운드 형태라
찌를 위험도 적고 손잡이 부분이 길어서 잡고 빗질하기
편해요 ㅎㅎ 디자인도 너무 귀엽고 무엇보다 잘 빗겨져서
만족도 높습니다 🤍🤍
reviews.content_en: With a straight comb, I used to worry about poking my dog's eyes, but BITE ME Jelly Bear Comb has a rounded shape so there's less risk of poking, and the handle is long so it's easier to hold and comb! 😄 The design is so cute and most importantly, it combs really well, so I'm very satisfied! 🤍🤍

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 곡선이라서 사용할때 눈 찌를까 걱정도 덜하고 애기가 거부감도 적은 것 같아요. 눈물 퐁퐁 강아지라 이런 조그만한 눈꼽빗 찾고 있었는데 좀 더 쟁여둬야겠어요!
reviews.content_en: Since it's curved, I worry less about poking the eyes while using it, and my puppy doesn't seem to resist it as much. My dog gets a lot of eye discharge, so I've been looking for a small eye booger comb like this - I should definitely keep a few on hand!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 바잇미 젤리곰 라운드 페이스콤! 받자마자 너무 귀여워서 마음에 쏙 들었습니다ㅠㅠ! 저희집 강아지는 빗질 및 눈꼽떼기도 너무 싫어하는데 원래쓰던건 손잡이도 없어서 강아지는 제 손이 너무 가까이오니 싫다 하고 그랬었는데 페이스콤은 손잡이도 있어서 눈에 손이 너무 가까이 가지 않아도 되더라구요!! 눈물을 닦고 나가도 오후되면 사람 수염자라는거마냥 눈꼽이 껴서 맨날 휴지로 살살 닦아줬는데 가방에도 쏙 들어가는 빗덕분에 맘이 한결 편해졌숩니다! 진짜 가격도 착하고 사용감도 좋고 심지어 귀엽기까지 1석3조예요!! 완전 추천함미다!!
reviews.content_en: BITE ME Jelly Bear Round Face Comb! I fell in love with it as soon as I got it because it's so cute 😭 My dog really hates combing and eye booger removal, but the one I used before didn't have a handle so my dog would hate it when my hand got too close to her eyes. But with the Face Comb, it has a handle so my hand doesn't have to get so close to her eyes! Even after wiping her tears and going out, by afternoon she gets eye boogers like a man with a beard, so I had to keep wiping with tissue, but thanks to this comb that fits right in my bag, I feel so much more at ease! The price is reasonable, it works great, and it's even cute - that's three benefits in one!! Totally recommend it!!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
기존에 사용하던 타사 페이스콤보다 
✅️날의 길이가 짧은 편이라 쉽게 휘어지지 않고 잘 빗겨져서 좋아요. 
✅️ 손잡이 부분이 길어서 안정적인 빗질을 할 수 있어요. 

아이보리색 개추🤍
reviews.content_en:
Compared to other brand's face combs I used before:
✅️ The teeth are shorter so they don't bend easily and comb really well.
✅️ The handle part is long so you can comb stably.

Ivory color - highly recommend 🤍

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
말티즈 키우는 견주분들이라면 없으면 떼어내려야 떼어낼 수 없는 템!!!!!!
눈꼽빗!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
역시나 찐 반려인 입장에서 만들어진 제품 답게 
반려인들 손에 딱 맞는 그립감과
타사 제품으로 두부 아이라인을 똑 떼어먹은 적이 있었는데🥲
둥근 모양으로 아이에게 자극도 덜하고 제품 크기도 딱 적당해요!!!
무엇보다 울 두부랑 똑 닮은 북극곰 모양🐻‍❄️🤍

영상 촬영은 못 했지만 정말 편하게 슉슉 하고 2초만에 눈꼽 제거 완료!

앞으로 바잇미 젤리곰 라운드 페이스콤 눈꼽빗으로 애뽀게 눈꼽 제거하고 애쁜 누나,형아,동생들 만나로 가야지 =33
reviews.content_en:
If you have a Maltese, this is a must-have item!!!!! Eye booger comb!!!!!!!!!!!!!! As you'd expect from a product made by true pet lovers, it has a grip that fits perfectly in pet owners' hands. I once accidentally scraped my dog's eyeliner with another brand's product 🥲 but the rounded shape causes less irritation and the product size is just right! Plus, the polar bear shape looks just like my Tofu 🐻‍❄️🤍

I didn't film a video but it's really easy to use - just whoosh whoosh and eye boogers are gone in 2 seconds!

From now on, I'll use BITE ME Jelly Bear Round Face Comb to remove my pup's eye boogers before meeting cute cousins, aunts, uncles and siblings =33

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 너무 부드럽게 잘되가지구 깜놀.. 잡기도 편하고 이 라운드 굴곡이 눈가에 딱 맞아서 그냥 쓱쓱 할 수 있어요👍 너무 잘 만든 상품이에요🖤
reviews.content_en: I was surprised at how smoothly it works.. it's easy to grip and the rounded curve fits perfectly along the eye area so you can just glide it right through 👍 It's a really well-made product! 🖤

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content:
하루만 눈꼽을 제거하지 않으면 굳어서 빗기 진짜 힘든데 너무 편하게 빗었어요
기존거는 직각이라 세밀하게 빗기 힘든데 이건 라운딩 형태라 편하고 빗살도 기존것보다 얇아서 더 빗을때 편하게 빗겨서 털도 억지로 뜯기는 형태가 아님

사진은 3일동안 누나가 귀찮아서 제거하지 않은 상태
reviews.content_en:
If you don't remove eye boogers for even one day, they harden and it becomes really difficult to comb, but this combs so smoothly! The old one is a right angle so it's hard to comb precisely, but this one is rounded so it's easier, and the teeth are thinner than the old one so it combs more smoothly without forcefully pulling out the hair.

The photo shows the state after my dog neglected to clean for 3 days

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 말티라 눈꼽빗 필수인데 두개 사서 너무 잘 쓰고 있어서 여기저기 두고 쓰려고 추가 주문했어요 빗이 각지지않고 둥글어서 안전해서 좋아요 바잇미꺼 쓰다보니 딴건 못쓰겠어요
reviews.content_en: Since I have a Maltese, an eye booger comb is essential, and I bought two and use them so well that I'm ordering more to keep in different places. The comb isn't sharp-edged and is rounded so it's safe - that's great! Once I started using BITE ME's, I can't use anything else!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
저희 본가에 강아지가 눈이 정말 안좋아서 눈꼽이 많이 생겨 앞이 잘 안보일정도인데 페이스콤으로 하면 싹 떼져서 넘 좋았어요
다른 브랜드 페이스콤은 잘 안떼져서 사용안했는데 저희 엄마도 탐내셔서 주고 왔습니다 ㅋㅋㅋ 저희 냥이도 눈꼽이 좀 생기는 편이라 슥슥 해주기 편하고 손잡이가 길어서 그립갑이 좋아요
떼주고나니 깔끔해진 얼굴🐱
reviews.content_en: Our dog at home has really poor eyesight and gets so much eye discharge that they can barely see ahead, but with this face comb it all comes off so easily—we love it! 😊 We didn't use other brand face combs because they didn't work well, but my mom liked ours so much I gave her one too lol. Our cat also tends to get eye discharge, so it's convenient to use, and the long handle feels great in the hand. After cleaning them up, their face looks so neat 🐱

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 라운드로 되어있어서 얼굴 빗어줄때 딱 좋아요🤍 손잡는 부분도 사용하기에 편해요!
reviews.content_en: The round shape is perfect for combing the face 🤍 The handle is also really convenient to use!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
라운드페이스콤 다른곳에서 나온 제품썼었는데
확실히 바잇미꺼가 손잡이가 있어서 그런지 편해요
reviews.content_en: I've tried round face combs from other brands before, but BITE ME's is definitely easier to use because it has a handle.

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
6살된 꼬미는 단 한 번도 라운드 형태의 눈곱빗을 써본 적이 없었는데.. 그동안 왜 안썼나 후회될 정도에요🥹 
밥이나 물먹고 축축해진 입가를 빗어 주거나 장난감을
하두 물고빨아서 침으로 더러워진 입가 빗어주기에도 너무 좋아요!! 기존에 쓰던 일자 눈곱빗은 다칠까봐도 걱정이였지만 빗고 나서 눈곱이나 털이 사이사이에 껴서 빠지지 않아서 매번 칫솔로 빼내고 그랬어야 했는데,, 요건 가볍게 물티슈로 쓱 닦아만 줘도 다 빠져서 너무 편해요😝 
그리고 핸들형이리서 짧은 손잡이 형태의 눈곱빗과 다르게 편하게 빗어줄 수 있어서 아주아주 만족하며 사용하고 있어용😍
사실 울애기들 용품 주인이 만족해야지 되잖아효?! 
모든 면에서 너무 좋고 간편하게 들고 다니기에도 좋고 무엇보다 귀여워서 대 만 족🤍
거기다가 가격도 착한 가격인데 안사면 지이인짜 후회해요 당장 겟하세요~~🫶
reviews.content_en: My 6-year-old Komi had never used a round-shaped eye discharge comb before... and now I'm actually regretting why we didn't use one sooner! 🥹 It's so great for combing the area around her mouth after eating or drinking when it's wet, or cleaning the sides of her mouth after she's been chewing and drooling on toys!! With the old straight comb I used to use, I worried about hurting her, and since fur and discharge would get stuck between the teeth and wouldn't come out, I'd have to pick them out with a toothbrush every time... but this one—you just gently wipe it with a tissue and everything comes right off, so it's so much easier! 😝 And because it has a handle, it's easier to comb compared to the short-handled eye discharge combs, so I'm very very satisfied with it 😍 I mean, the pet parent has to be happy with their pet's products, right?! It's great in every way, it's easy to carry around, and most importantly it's adorable—totally satisfied 🤍 Plus the price is so reasonable, if you don't buy it you'll seriously regret it. Get it now!! 🫶

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
그동안 페이스콤 수도없이 써봤는데 이거 정말 물건이에요! 👍
뿌꾸는 눈꼽정리를 좋아하는 편인데, 적당히 촘촘하고 둥근 모양이 눈 앞머리 외에 눈 주변 정리하기에도 정말 편리해요. 
각진부분이 전혀 없어서 눈꼽정리 싫어하는 아가들도 안전하게 사용할 수 있겠어요! 
손잡이도 제가 여자치고 손이 큰편인데 두께며 길이며 그립감이 너무 좋아요. 
눈꼽정리 이전에 바잇미 코튼솜에 아이클리너로 살짝 닦아주고 하는것도 추천해요! 원래 사용하던 제품인데 체험단으로 보내주셔서 아주 꿀이네용 🤗
reviews.content_en: I've tried face combs countless times, but this one is seriously the real deal! 👍 My Ppukku likes having eye discharge cleaned, and the moderately dense and rounded shape is really convenient not just for around the eyes but for the entire eye area. Since there are no sharp corners at all, even babies who hate eye discharge cleaning can use it safely! The handle feels great too—I have pretty big hands for a woman, and the thickness, length, and grip are perfect. I also recommend using BITE ME cotton pads with an eye cleanser to gently wipe before combing! It's a product I already use, and since I got to try it as a reviewer, it's such a steal 🤗

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content:
상추는 눈물이 많은아이에요 
흥분할때도 맛있는거먹으면 눈물이나요
손쉬운관리가 필요한 상추엄마로써 눈물관리는 필수죠!
눈물에 세균이 많아서 냄새도 나고 항상 눈가가 젖어있는 상추도 많이 불편해하는 것을 보니 속상했는데 바잇미 젤리곰 라운드 페이스콤을 써보니 확실히 편하고 상추도 편한지 가만히 있네요ㅎㅎ
사실 반려견만 쓰는제품만 봤었는데 저랑 상추 둘에게 편안한 제품이라 만족도가 더 높은 바잇미 젤리곰 라운드 페이스콤이네요~
긴 손잡이가있어서 손목터널증후군이 있는 저에게는 안성맞춤이죠ㅎㅎ대단히 편합니다!
그동안 일자인 제품을썼는데 눈가를 찌를거같아서 조심조심하느라 시간도오래걸리는느낌이였는데 믿을구석이 생겨서 기분이좋습니다~
피부자극도 확실히 줄어든느낌이나네요~
잘 사용하겠습니다!!
reviews.content_en: Sangchu is a dog who tears a lot. She gets teary when excited or after eating something delicious. As Sangchu's mom, managing the tears is essential! Since there are lots of bacteria in tears, there's smell and I felt bad seeing her uncomfortable with the constantly wet eyes, but after trying BITE ME's Jelly Bear Round Face Comb, it's definitely more convenient and Sangchu sits still now hehe. Actually, I'd only seen products for pets, but since it's comfortable for both me and Sangchu, I'm even more satisfied with the BITE ME Jelly Bear Round Face Comb~ Having the long handle is perfect for me since I have carpal tunnel syndrome hehe. It's really convenient! I used to use the straight type before, and I had to be so careful because I worried about poking her eye area, which took a long time... but now I feel confident, so I'm happy 😊 And the skin irritation seems to have definitely decreased~ I'll use it well!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
눈물왕 이뽀동 좋아서 눈물 좔좔 슬퍼도 눈물좔좔 ,,( •̛̣̣꒶̯•̛̣̣ )
그런 나에게 필수품인 눈꼽빗 🪮〰️

털래기 빗질은 하루에 한번해도 눈, 코 옆, 입 주위는 수 없이 빗질 함
근데 다른 눈꼽빗은 끝이 날카로워서 빗을 때 마다 자극 되는 거 같고 너무 싫고 무서웠단 말야 ? 그래서 페이스 빗질 하눈 게 넘 싫었어 😤

그런데 평소 좋아하던 바잇미에서 페이스콤이 새롭게 출시 됐데 〰️
우럼마 내 눈꼽,얼굴 빗느라 세상에 있는 눈꼽빗은 거의 다 써봤고
마침 눈꼽빗 바꿀 때 됐는데 좋은 기회로 이렇게 먼저 써 볼 기회가 생겼다고 신났드라 ,,

먼저 바잇미 페이스 콤은 끝이 뭉뚝하니 찔리거나 다칠 걱정도 없고 
눈가 외에도 페이스 전체 다 자극없이 잘 빗겨서 아주 좋아써 👌🏻
우럼마는 다른 눈꼽빗들과는 다르게 손잡이가 있어서 
편하고 안정감 있다고 요기조기 쓱-쓱 빗기 너무 좋데 ◡̈⋆*

거기다가 디자인까지 바잇미스러워 ᰔᩚ
눈꼽빗이 이렇게 귀여울 수도 있는 일인가 ꒰⍢꒱ !

나 눈물왕자 이뽀동 ૮ᐡ•ﻌ•ᐡა
앞으로 페이스콤 은 바잇미로 정착한다 ᯓ★
reviews.content_en:
Ippodong, the tear queen, cries because she loves crying... teardrops when sad too ,, ( •̛̣̣꒶̯•̛̣̣ ) For someone like me, an eye discharge comb is essential 🪮〰️ I comb Teolraegi's fur once a day, but the area around the eyes, nose, and mouth—I have to comb that countless times. But other eye discharge combs have sharp ends, so they seem to irritate every time I comb, and honestly I hated it and was scared of it 😤 So I really hated combing the face area. But then BITE ME, a brand I usually love, released a new face comb 〰️ I've tried pretty much every eye discharge comb in the world because of my constant need, and I was due for a replacement anyway, so I was so excited to get this opportunity to try it first ,,

First of all, the BITE ME face comb has blunt ends so there's no worry about poking or hurting, and it combs the whole face without irritation, not just around the eyes—I really love it 👌🏻 I'm the kind of mom who, unlike other eye discharge combs, appreciates having a handle that makes it convenient and stable to use comfortably all over the place, brushing back and forth 〰️〰️ ◡̈⋆* Plus the design is so BITE ME-like ᰔᩚ Can an eye discharge comb really be this cute? ꒰⍢꒱ ! I'm Ippodong, the tear queen ૮ᐡ•ﻌ•ᐡა From now on, the face comb is settling on BITE ME ᯓ★

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너무너무 귀여운 젤리곰라운드페이스콤 !

모서리 부분이 늘 눈에 찔릴 수 있어 조심하면서 썼는데
라운드로 잡아주니 걱정없이 빗길 수 있어서 좋았습니다

간혹 핀이 빠지는경우가 있는데
핀 빠짐없이 튼튼하고

손잡이 부분까지 감아잡을 수 있어서
사소한 부분까지 신경쓴 느낌 팍팍납니다

편하고 좋아서 여러개 사둬야겠어요!
reviews.content_en: Such a cute jelly bear round face comb! I used to be careful because the corners could poke the eyes, but now that it's rounded, I can comb without worry—that's great! Sometimes the bristles would fall out, but these are sturdy without any bristle loss, and the handle can even be grasped all the way around, so you can feel the attention to detail is there ✓✓ It's convenient and good, so I need to buy a few more!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 이런 페이스콤 완전 원했어요ㅜㅜ 세상도 잘 빗겨지고 눈가 찔릴까 걱정도 없고 디자인도 넘 귀엽고 깜찍한게 완전 맘에 쏙이에요! 보통 페이스콤에 눈꼽이나 털 껴서 잘 안빠지고 빗살 사이나 안쪽부분에 남아있어서 너무 찝찝했는데 젤리곰 라운드 페이스콤은 끼어있는 털이나 눈꼽도 잘 떼어져서 좋아요! 그렇다고 빗살 간격이 넓은것도 아닌데 말이에요! 역시 믿고쓰는 바잇미네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: This is exactly the kind of face comb I wanted!! It combs smoothly, I don't worry about poking the eye area, the design is so adorable and cute—I absolutely love it! Usually with face combs, eye discharge and fur get stuck and won't come out, leaving stuff between and inside the bristles which was so uncomfortable, but the Jelly Bear Round Face Comb gets the stuck fur and discharge off easily—that's great! And this is without the bristles being too far apart either! BITE ME really is trustworthy hehe 😊

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
✏️바잇미 젤리곰 라운드 페이스콤 *체험단*
⠀
저희 강아지가 눈물도 많고 눈꼽도 정말 자주 껴서
눈꼽빗으로 하루에 두번씩은 정리를 해줘요
매일 하는데도 항상 불편해하고 거부하더라구요😂
근데 젤리곰 눈꼽빗은 크게 거부감 없이 잘받아줬어요
제가 빗질해주면서도 전에 사용하던것보다 훨씬 부드럽게 느껴졌구요
눈꼽 정리도 당연히 잘되고 손잡이 덕에 머즐털 정리할때도 편해요! 
아 근데 진짜 요물은 눈물세정제에요.. 
키위 항상 젖어있던 눈앞머리 전용 화장솜에 적셔서 닦아주니깐 완전 깔꼼👍👍 추천합니다❣️
reviews.content_en: ✏️ BITE ME Jelly Bear Round Face Comb *reviewer unit* Our dog has lots of tears and gets eye discharge really frequently, so I clean it twice a day with the eye discharge comb. Even though I do it every day, she always gets uncomfortable and refuses 😂 But with the Jelly Bear eye discharge comb, she accepted it without much resistance. As I was combing, it felt much softer than what I used before. Of course the eye discharge cleaning works well, and thanks to the handle it's convenient to clean around the muzzle too! Oh, but honestly the real gem is the tear cleanser... When I dampened Kiwi's always-wet eye area with the dedicated cotton pads and wiped, it was completely clean 👍👍 Highly recommend it ❣️

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
그동안 사용하던 눈꼽빗이 다소 날이 길어 아가들이 살짝 겁먹어 했어요. 저도 눈을 찌를까 조심스러웠구요. 그동안 바잇미 제품 눈여겨보고 있었는데..굳이 또 구입해야하나 싶어 장바구니에ㅎㅎ
드뎌 구입했네요. 기분좋게 배송비도 무로^^
예상보다 더 작아 놀랐어요. 참 깜찍하네요. 손잡이가 있어 사용도 편리하구요. 아무래도 작다보니 아가들도 좀 덜 겁 먹어요ㅎ 눈 찌를 염려도 거의 없구요. 눈꼽은..음... 잘 빗깁니다. 좋아요 좋아~^^

그런데 살짝 단점이 있어요ㅠ
빗이 작다보니 눈꼽과 이물질이 날 안쪽에 끼면 잘 안 빠져요. 칫솔로 살살 빗어줘야 빠지네요. 그것만 보완하면 완벽할 거 같아요.
아마도 날 연결되는 부분 플라스틱이 두꺼워 그런듯요. 다음에는 좀더 얇게 제작해주심 더 좋을 것 같아요.

어쨌든 지금까지 사용 제품 중 젤루 좋습니당♡
reviews.content_en:
The eye comb I was using before had teeth that were a bit long, which made my babies a little nervous. I was also worried about poking their eyes. I'd been eyeing BITE ME products for a while, but I kept putting off buying another one and just left it in my cart haha

Finally decided to get it! And I got free shipping too^^

I was surprised at how much smaller it is than expected. It's so cute! The handle makes it easy to use. Since it's smaller, the babies are less nervous about it haha And there's almost no risk of poking their eyes. The comb works well for getting eye boogers out... yes, it works great!^^

But there's a slight downside ㅠ
Since the comb is small, when eye boogers and debris get caught inside the teeth, they don't come out easily. I have to gently brush them out with a toothbrush. If that could be fixed, it would be perfect.

I think it's because the plastic where the teeth connect is too thick. If you make it a bit thinner next time, it would be even better.

Anyway, out of all the products I've used so far, this is by far the best♡

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
손잡이가 길어서 반려인이 너무 편하고!
빗 끝이 부드러워서 강아지도 안 싫어하고 가만히 질 빗빌 당해(?) 줍니다ㅎㅎ 너무 만족해요!
reviews.content_en:
The long handle makes it so convenient for pet parents!
The comb teeth are soft so my dog doesn't hate it and just sits still while I brush hehe I'm so satisfied!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 일단 너무 귀여운 디자인의 빗이라 사고싶었고.. 손잡이가 길어서 간혹 털이 엉켜서 조금 세게 힘을 가해서 빗을때 기존의 빗은 손에서 미끌리거나 힘을 너무 줘야해서 불편했는데, 바잇미 빗은 손잡이가 길다보니 여유롭게 잡고서 빗을 수 있어서 넘 편했습니당.ᐟ 좁은 주머니에도 들어가는 세로형 타입이라 외출 시 들고다니기에도 넘 좋아요 🙂
reviews.content_en: First of all, I wanted to buy it because the design is so cute.. The handle is long, so when my dog's fur gets tangled and I need to brush a bit harder, the old comb would slip in my hand or I'd have to use too much force. But with the BITE ME comb, the long handle lets me grip it comfortably and brush so easily.ᐟ It's a vertical type that fits in narrow pockets too, so it's super convenient to take on outings 🙂

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
오전에 눈꼽 떼줘도 오후에 잔뜩 끼어있는 
눈꼽부자 강쥐 손 들어🙋‍♀️🙋‍♀️

기존에 가지고 있던 페이스콤에 비해 더 넓고 커서
불편하지 않을까... 걱정했는데
세상 손에 착 감기는 느낌💕

약간은 묵직함이 빗질의 중심을 잡아주는 느낌이랄까?

전체적으로 둥근쉐입에
빗살 자체도 둥글둥글해서
찌를 걱정 없이 안정적으로 빗질 할 수 있었어요

눈물과 눈꼽 찌든 미간털 빗을 때
진정한 빛을 발하는
바잇미 페이스콤✨️

빗질하다 지치세여?
빗살 위에 곰돌이 보면 기분이 얼마나 좋아지게~

체험단이라 그런거 아니고
진짜 벌써부터 주변에 잔뜩 소문내버림
reviews.content_en:
Eye boogers even in the afternoon after cleaning them in the morning
Fur babies with eye booger problems, raise your hand 🙋‍♀️🙋‍♀️

I was worried it might be inconvenient since it's wider and bigger than the face comb I had before...
But it fits so perfectly in my hand 💕

There's a slight weight to it that helps center your combing motion, you know?

Overall rounded shape and
the comb teeth themselves are nice and rounded too
So I could comb without worrying about poking, really stable

When brushing tear stains and eye boogers in the area between the eyes
the BITE ME face comb truly shines✨️

Getting tired from combing?
Just seeing the little bear on the comb teeth makes you feel so much better~

It's not just because I'm a tester
I'm already spreading the word like crazy to everyone around me

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
고양이 턱드름 제거에 최고에요!!!!!!!!!!!쾌감 대박 
진짜 띵작이라 생각합니다 ^^ 아프거나 찔리는거도 없어서 대충 휘어잡은 상태로 
호다닥 빗어주면 수확량은 많고 시간은 덜 들어서 그냥 쩝쩝 입맛다시면서 떠나용
짱나는 행동하면 그 날 하루는 고양이랑 절교해야하는데 
턱드름 빗기는 절교는 아니고 고양이가 좀 참아주는 수준으로 끝나서 조아용 ^^
reviews.content_en:
It's the best for removing cat chin acne!!!!!!!!!The satisfaction is amazing
I really think it's a masterpiece ^^ There's no pain or pricking sensation, so I just roughly grab it and
brush away—I get lots of results in less time, so I just smack my lips and move on
When the cat acts annoyed, normally I'd give her the cold shoulder for the whole day
but with combing out chin acne, she just tolerates it without major protest, and I like that ^^

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
손잡이가 길어서 그립감 좋고 빗살 모서리가 라운딩 되어있어 눈찌를 위험도 덜 하고 좋아요~ 동물 얼굴모양 디자인도 마음에 들어요 :D 
타브랜드에 손잡이 길지않은 라운드 페이스콤이 있는데 가격도 비싸고 빗살이 빠지는 불량이 있어서 별로였는데 바잇미 젤리곰 라운드 페이스콤은 가격,디자인,내구성 모두 만족스러워요 :-) 추천해요!!
reviews.content_en:
The long handle feels great to grip, and the comb teeth have rounded edges so there's less risk of poking their eyes—I like it~ I also love the animal face design :D
Another brand has a round face comb without a long handle, but it was pricey and had quality issues with teeth falling out, so it wasn't great. But the BITE ME jelly bear round face comb satisfies me on price, design, and durability :-) I recommend it!!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
손잡이가 길어서 참 편해요
그리고 빗이 곡선형태라서 강아지가 덜 아파하는것 같아요.
전에는 손잡이 있는 일자형태 눈꼽빗을 썼었는데..
이게 훨씬 좋은 것 같아요.
손잡이가 길어서.. 강아지 눈을 손으로 가리지 않고 눈꼽을 제거할 수 있어서 좋네요
reviews.content_en:
The long handle is really convenient
And since the comb is curved, my dog seems to feel less pain.
I used to use a straight eye comb with a handle before...
This one is much better.
With the long handle, I can remove eye boogers without covering my dog's eyes with my hand, which is great

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
올해 9살 접어든 푸들 공주님 모시는 집사임당~😎
바잇미 제품은 가성비도 좋고~
품질도 좋아서 애용하고 있어요!
이번에 출시된 눈꼽빗 너무 귀여운거 아닙니꽈~~~😍
뽀족하지 않은 라운드라 눈찌를 걱정도 없고~
손잡이도 길어서 편한것 같아요!
산책모임 강아지 칭구가 있는데 나눔 하려고 2개 샀어요~
reviews.content_en:
I'm the pet parent of a 9-year-old poodle princess this year~😎
BITE ME products have great value for money~
and the quality is good so I use them regularly!
The eye comb that just came out is so cute~~~😍
Since it's rounded and not sharp, there's no worry about poking eyes~
And the long handle makes it convenient!
I have a dog friend in my walking group so I bought 2 to share~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 평소에 눈꼽떼려고 빗질하면 진짜 소리지르고 난리나는데 그래도 이정도면 양반이네요.. 잘 떼어지고 빗살끝이 둥글게 처리되어있어서 안심입니다. 그리고 손잡이 길어서 구립감 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Usually when I try to brush to remove eye boogers, my pup screams and goes crazy, but this is manageable.. It removes them well and the comb teeth are rounded so I feel safe. Plus the long handle gives a good grip

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 손으로 잡고 사용하기 쉽게 날렵한 그립, 또 빗살이 까칠하거나 날카롭지 않아 얼굴 살살 빗어주기 넘 좋네요! 눈꼽이랑 얼굴에 붙은 것들이 잘 떨어져나와요 여러개 사둘걸 그랬어요 :(
reviews.content_en: The sleek grip makes it easy to hold and use, and the comb teeth aren't rough or sharp—it feels so nice brushing gently on the face! Eye boogers and other stuff stuck on the face come right off. I wish I'd bought multiple 😭

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
딸아이가 강아지의 눈물자국이 보호자의 자격유무를
따지길래 ;;;
그 만큼 관리를 잘 하라는 거겠죠..
물론 병이 심한 아이는 어쩔수 없이 병원에 다녀야 겠지만요..

댕댕이 스트레스 받을까봐 그리고 집에 있던 사진속 노랑이는
뾰족해서 가만히 안 있는 우리집 댕댕이 눈 보호 차원에서
이 둥근 빗을 보고 망설이지 않고 구매 했어요:)

사용하기 편리합니다~
reviews.content_en: My daughter pointed out that my puppy's tear stains reflect on me as a pet parent ;;; So I guess that means I need to take better care of them.. Of course, if a pup has a serious condition, there's no choice but to visit the vet.. I was worried about stressing out my doggy, and the yellow one in the photos I had at home had pointy teeth, so I didn't hesitate to buy this round brush to protect my active pup's eyes :) It's very convenient to use~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 꼬질꼬질 우리 강쥐 눈꼽 이쁘게 잘 떼어줬어요>_< 손잡이가 길어서 편하네요~~ 눈 찌를 걱정도 없어서 잘 사용할게요
reviews.content_en: It cleaned my pup's crusty eye boogers so nicely >_< The long handle is really convenient~~ No worries about poking the eyes, so I'll use it well

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아요! 빗살부분이 둥글다해서 진짜 자극이 적을까 싶었는데 진짜 자극이 적어요. 기존에 다*소 제품이 가성비 좋다해서 썼는데 확실히 다릅니다. 다*소 제품은 빗을때 훨씬 자극적이에요. 디자인도 너무 귀엽고 담에 세일하면 몇개 더 쟁여둘까 합니다.
reviews.content_en: It's amazing! I was skeptical about whether the rounded bristles would really reduce irritation, but they really do. I used another brand before because of the good value, but this is definitely different. That other brand's brush is way more irritating when you use it. The design is also super cute, and if it goes on sale next time, I'm thinking about stocking up on a few more.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 그립감이 좋고 튼튼해서 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: The grip feels good and it's sturdy, which I love!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 손잡이도 있고 라운드된 모양까지 넘 편해요! 그동안 샀던건 빗부분이 라운드면 손잡이가 없고 손잡이가 있으면 라운드모양이 아니라 계속 아쉬웠는데 둘다 충족된 제품이라 넘 만족스러워요.
reviews.content_en: It has a handle AND a rounded shape, so it's super convenient! Before this, I was always frustrated because if the brush part was rounded, there was no handle, and if there was a handle, it wasn't rounded. But this product checks both boxes, so I'm really satisfied!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
그립감도 좋고 인뾰족하고 소형견한테 딱이에요
빗기고나면 정리가 잘 되서 넘 이뻐져요
저번에 산 게 한 줄이 빠져서 재구매햇어요
엔배송도 담날 바로 오고 넘 좋네요
reviews.content_en: The grip feels good and it's not poky and perfect for small dogs. After brushing, the eye boogers come out so cleanly and it looks so pretty. The one I bought before was missing a row of bristles, so I repurchased. And the delivery came the next day, so I'm super happy!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
페th룸 눈꼽빗 썼었는데, 그것보다 좀 더 작고 부드럽게 잘 빗겨지네요

손잡이가 있어서 어떨지 궁금했었는데 그립감도 좋고 은근히
편해요..!
reviews.content_en: I used a Pet-hum eye boogy brush before, and this one is a bit smaller and brushes more gently. I was curious about the handle, but the grip feels good and it's surprisingly convenient..!

reviews.name: 방****
reviews.content: 얼리버드 떴을 때부터 구매하고 싶었는데 기존 눈꼽빗도 딱히 불편하진 않아서 고민하다가 구입했습니다. 근데..  생각보다 훨씬 편하네요!ㅋㅋ 빗을 들고 각도를 이리저리 잴 것 없이 슥 떼면되니 편해요. 받자마자 눈꼽떼기 시전하고 사진 찍어서 물기가 있어요ㅋ 다만 손잡이가 있어 내가 얼마나 힘을 주는지 알기 어려우니 불려서 떼는게 좋을것 같아요. 내
reviews.content_en: I wanted to buy this since the early bird deal dropped, but since my existing eye boogy brush wasn't really inconvenient, I was hesitant. But.. it's way more convenient than I thought!ㅋㅋ You don't have to adjust the angle or anything—just swipe and it comes off, so it's easy. I used it right when I got it and took a picture, so there's moisture in itㅋ The only thing is that because there's a handle, it's hard to tell how much force I'm applying, so I think it's better to gently remove them. My

reviews.name: 모****
reviews.content: 기존에 쓰던 눈꼽빗보다 훨씬 부드럽게 빗기고 라운드형이라 아기가 놀라지도 않아요. 뾰족하지않아서 너무 좋습니다. 가격도 저렴해서 자주 바꿔줄수 있을 것 같아요. 콤마빗도 이렇게 저렴한 바잇미제품나왔으면 좋겠어요!!
reviews.content_en: It brushes so much more gently than my old eye boogy brush, and because it's rounded, my baby doesn't get startled. It's so great that it's not pointy. The price is affordable too, so I can replace it often. I wish BITE ME had eye comb brushes this affordable too!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
저럼히 사서 좋으네요 귀엽고손잡이 있어서 편하긴하네여 ~
여러개사서 가방에넣고다니고 집에 두고쓰고 지인선물하려고 샀어요
reviews.content_en: I bought it randomly and I'm happy with it. It's cute and has a handle which is convenient~ I bought several to keep in my bag, one at home, and some to give as gifts to friends
